title: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an OS Command ('OS Command Injection')

references.description: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an OS Command ('OS Command Injection')
Security of processing for command injection exposure when personal data is reachable from the compromised process.
references.condition: The affected system processes personal data as defined by GDPR Art. 4

references.description: ICT risk management controls for command execution weaknesses in financial entity infrastructure.
references.condition: The affected system is part of the ICT infrastructure of a financial entity subject to DORA

references.description: Security in network and information systems acquisition, development, and maintenance.
references.condition: The entity is an essential or important entity subject to NIS2
